ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the post image (if applicable) */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the post video (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last edited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if applicable) */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last edited */,
  "date_commented" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the like is on (NULL if comment) */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the like is on (NULL if post) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the like */,
  "date_liked" TEXT /* Date and time the like was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user followed another user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follows_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the post */,
  "trending_score" REAL /* Trending score of the post */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range of the analytics data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "date_range")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who performed the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task performed */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the task was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_tasks_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task performed */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the task was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_tasks_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
